title: excoecaria obovata
intro: Excoecaria obovata is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the poison tree or obovate excoecaria. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Excoecaria obovata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Excoecaria obovata is typically processed into a paste or powder, which can be applied topically to the affected area or taken internally in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
